reason: golangci-lint rules, forbidden patterns, test coverage targets, code review checklist
Verify all errors wrapped correctly, no bare returns, correct status codes
Verify no sensitive data leaked in logs (credentials, passwords, JWT, command output)
Verify GORM conventions followed, no SQL injection, migrations idempotent
Biome lint check, tsc --noEmit, code review checklist (no any/as/@ts-ignore)
Verify all API responses parsed with Zod, no type assertions, discriminated unions correct
Verify named exports, no default exports, a11y labels on icon buttons, no inline styles
Verify TanStack Query keys follow convention, mutations invalidate queries, staleTime defaults
Verify handler→service→repository boundaries respected, no cross-layer violations
Verify all acceptance criteria are met, features implemented match PRD scope
Verify architecture decisions followed (encryption flow, SSH pool design, WebSocket protocol, agent design)
Verify all test scenarios pass, validation commands succeed, completion criteria met
